allow: Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x\)'\);db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(?\)'\).run\(1\);console.log\('node:sqlite OK', db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).all\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['web/index.html','web/registros.html','web/login.html']\){const s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const m=[...s.matchAll\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)].map\(x=>x[1]\).join\('\\n;\\n'\);try{new Function\('supabase','navigator','location','document','window','alert','FormData',m\);console.log\(f,'JS OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(f,'JS ERROR',e.message\)}}")
